subject: Fire Energy, a red orb with a flame symbol on a radiant red background
description: A large red orb bearing a black flame symbol is centered on a radiant red background. White rays of light emanate from behind the orb, giving it an intense, glowing quality. The symbol on the orb is the classic Pokemon fire-type icon — a stylized flame shape. The entire image is monochromatic in reds and whites, creating a powerful graphic impact. The design is iconic and symbolic rather than narrative.
foreground: large red orb with black flame symbol, radiating white light
